typeLine: Abecedarian's Stibnite Flask of the Impala
implicitMods: Creates a Smoke Cloud on Use
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Ashes of the Stars
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Skill Gems
+22% to Quality of all Skill Gems
flavourText: A single facet contains the wisdom
of countless disintegrated worlds.

name: Dialla's Malefaction
explicitMods: Gems can be Socketed in this Item ignoring Socket Colour
Gems Socketed in Red Sockets have +2 to Level
Gems Socketed in Green Sockets have +30% to Quality
Gems Socketed in Blue Sockets gain 100% increased Experience
flavourText: He took me by my hand, promised me power beyond compare.
But I did not do it for power.
I did it for love.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile skills, and any other skills that chain.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 15% increased Chaining range
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "We are all connected. Each of us burns with the same fire.
Queen Hyrri knew that... she chooses to battle still, somewhere
beyond Hinekora's sight. There must be a very good reason."

name: The Embalmer
explicitMods: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level 20 Vile Toxins
flavourText: "Decomposition takes hold too quickly!
No, if we are to keep the specimen in perfect shape,
we must begin the process before expiry."

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.
